{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Starhammer's design
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] was designed by [[Mell]] with a protective impulse that synergized with his core personality.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“I didn’t program any…affection into him. Just a protective impulse, which synergized with his core personality.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
